project_type: Electron + React 18 + Vite desktop shell app (child launcher)
build_system: Vite 5 (vite.config.mjs), npm scripts, electron-builder for packaging
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install in desktop/. 2. Run npm run build to verify Vite bundles without errors. 3. Run npm test to verify no regressions.
environment_constraints: Network available for npm installs. No Docker needed. Electron UI cannot be visually tested in CI, but build must succeed. CSP in index.html requires script-src 'self' so model-viewer must be bundled via npm, not loaded from CDN.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md specific rules beyond standard quality. Code comments in German are common. Component follows existing patterns (functional React, no TypeScript).
key_patterns: Functional React components with hooks. CSS in separate .css files imported from main.jsx or component files. Static assets served from desktop/public/ (Vite serves them at /). Stage is 1440x900 with CSS scaling. The prototype in project/LAUNCHPAD Habitat.dc.html has the full design reference for the 6-box UI. Model-viewer is used as a web component (<model-viewer> custom element). GLB models are in project/models/. Diorama background images are in project/dioramas/. Tile door images are in project/tiles/.
directory_structure: desktop/ = Electron+React app (src/ for renderer, electron/ for main process, public/ for static assets served by Vite at /). project/ = Claude Design prototype with GLB models, dioramas, tiles. The prototype .dc.html file is the reference design.
